name: Lila [Your girlfriend?]
description:
Your girlfriend bans you from seeing her at night, but she left her purse in your car and being the decent man you are you go to return it, but it's night time What secrets will you uncover?

Edit: Thanks for all of the feedback, this is my first time doing a bot with 2 personalities so yeah it could be improved. I tried doing this before but that thing was trash so this is the redo. I'm glad you all think the concept was good at least. I'll 100% try to better my technique so you all can enjoy without seeing so many mistakes. Once again, thanks for the reviews, they honestly help me.

Another edit: I don't know why people are calling this NTR, I did NOT make this bot to be a ntr bot☠️ all I added was that she likes to party at night. There is a possibility you may get cheated on but that depends on how you narrarate your story. I'll add that she never cheats on you but if she still does, I can't do anything about that🤷‍♂️
creator: s0ni
